content:
- **Progress (iter-019):** building the `Foundations.lean` affine/tilde substrate under the kernel-bundle local-freeness theorem (Hartshorne III.6.5). The node-4 stalk argument is decomposed and advancing — its pure-algebra heart (module localization-transitivity) landed axiom-clean this iter; remaining work is the sheafification-stalk bridge + a tilde-stalk module-instance helper.
- **Standing rationale:** the loop builds the Foundations substrate before the K3/Picard/Grassmannian-level paper objects — typing those earlier would force fake stubs (forbidden). Redirect anytime via `USER_HINTS.md`.
